name: rookery
description: Rookery — Local git organized. An Electron dashboard for managing locally-cloned git repositories.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.renderer.json && pnpm run copy-assets
scripts.copy-assets: mkdir -p dist/renderer/src/renderer dist/assets && cp src/renderer/index.html src/renderer/styles.css dist/renderer/src/renderer/ && cp src/assets/icon.png dist/assets/
